/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-z,relro,-z,now -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/punto-tests.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/punto-tests.dir/test_mapping.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/punto-tests.dir/test_swapper.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/punto-tests.dir/test_heuristic.cpp.o" -o punto-tests  ../src/core/libpunto-core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
